title: Build Todo app v1 per SPEC.md
description:
Build the v1 Todo app end-to-end per SPEC.md (RedwoodSDK + Cloudflare D1 + Drizzle + React 19 RSC).

Scope (from SPEC.md):
- §4 Architecture: RedwoodSDK on Cloudflare Workers, Vite, bun, Drizzle ORM over D1.
- §5 Data model: single `todos` table (id text PK, title text 1-200, completed integer 0/1, created_at integer ms). Schema in src/db/schema.ts; export Todo via Drizzle InferSelectModel.
- §6 Server functions: src/server/todos.ts -> listTodos, createTodo, toggleTodo, deleteTodo. Validation via ValidationError from src/server/errors.ts. Wrap unexpected errors as InternalError.
- §7 UI: src/app/components/TodoList.tsx (server, async), TodoForm.tsx ('use client'), TodoItem.tsx ('use client', useOptimistic). Tailwind utility classes only, a11y rules per spec.
- §8 Routing: single GET / route, page title "Todos".
- §10 Tests: unit tests for server functions against in-memory SQLite via better-sqlite3 (happy path, validation failures, toggle semantics, idempotent delete).
- README documenting develop, local migrations, deploy.

Acceptance (from SPEC §11):
- bun install && bun run dev produces working app at http://localhost:5173.
- All three quality gates green: `bun test`, `bun run lint`, `bun run typecheck`.
- Primary flow (§3) works without console errors.
- `curl -s http://localhost:5173/ | grep -i '<h1>Todos'` matches (proves SSR).
- After dev restart, previously-added todos persist (proves D1 persistence).
- README covers develop / local migrations / deploy.

Non-goals (§2): no auth, no real-time sync, no deploy automation, no mobile/offline, no extra features.

Lead should decompose into builders: scaffold + DB layer, server functions + unit tests, UI + route + README. Sequence as needed.
closeReason: v1 complete. Foundation merged (251c271), UI merged. All quality gates green.
